name: FizzBuzz
description: Write a program that takes integer n as first command-line argument and prints numbers from 1 to n, one per line. For multiples of 3 print "Fizz", for multiples of 5 print "Buzz", for multiples of both print "FizzBuzz".

test_cases.expected:
1
2
Fizz
4
Buzz
Fizz
7
8
Fizz
Buzz
11
Fizz
13
14
FizzBuzz
